name: Gwadar Beach (Main City Beach)
description: Main public beach of Gwadar with calm Arabian Sea waves and sunset views.

name: Koh-e-Batil Viewpoint
description: Highest viewpoint in Gwadar offering panoramic city, port, and sea views.

name: Hammerhead Peninsula
description: Famous natural land shape forming Gwadar’s hammerhead-like structure.

name: Marine Drive Gwadar
description: Scenic coastal road along Arabian Sea, popular for night drives.

name: Sunset View Point Gwadar
description: Best sunset spot in Gwadar overlooking the Arabian Sea horizon.

name: Gwadar Port View Point
description: Viewpoint overlooking Gwadar deep sea port (CPEC project).

name: Pishukan Fishing Village
description: Traditional fishing village known for boats, seafood, and coastal life.

name: Jiwani Beach
description: Remote untouched beach near Iran border with dolphins and mangroves.

name: Daran Beach Jiwani
description: Turtle nesting beach with untouched natural environment.

name: Pasni Beach
description: Peaceful fishing town beach with golden sand and calm water.

name: Pasni Town
description: Coastal town famous for seafood and Makran highway stop.

name: Ormara Beach
description: Quiet clean beach ideal for camping and long coastal drives.

name: Ormara Town
description: Important coastal town between Karachi and Gwadar.

name: Buzi Pass
description: Scenic mountain pass on Makran Coastal Highway with desert-sea views.

name: Kund Malir Beach
description: One of Asia’s most beautiful beaches inside Hingol National Park.

name: Hingol National Park
description: Largest national park in Pakistan with desert, mountains, and coastal areas.

name: Princess of Hope
description: Natural rock formation shaped like a standing woman.

name: Astola Island
description: Pakistan’s largest offshore island with marine life and camping spots.

name: Gwadar Cricket Stadium
description: Modern stadium near coastline symbolizing Gwadar development.

name: Gwadar Industrial Zone
description: Developing industrial area under CPEC near port region.

name: Gadani Ship Breaking Yard
description: One of the world’s largest ship breaking industries.

name: Sonmiani Beach
description: Popular weekend beach near Karachi side of Balochistan.

name: Makran Coastal Highway Scenic Route
description: Famous highway connecting Karachi to Gwadar along coast and desert.

name: Ormara Naval Base Area
description: Strategic Pakistan Navy base located in Ormara coastal region.

name: Jiwani Mangrove Forest
description: Important ecological mangrove forest near Iran border.
